title: The Moon
description: Datapack that turns the overworld into the moon, very boring currently, but I will add biomes and stuff at some point!
body:
Datapack that makes the overworld the moon, now with stunning craters, and a singular rather dull biome with small boulders.  By the end I want it to be a really fun and unique experince, but for now its a work-in-progress.  The craters are very cool though, and you should check it out just for those, _now_.  Also if you download this mod, **you will get a free serbian black bear with express shipping, dropped into your house from our sponsor blockbuster video** 

<details>
<summary>Legal Notice</summary>
just kidding for the lawyers out there who want a 300lb serbian black bear, or are worried about their house
</details>


Planned:
- biomes (1 right now)
- gravity (0.0.2 very soon, jk I hate mc function)
- structures (Never done before) (moon village is gonna be wild)
- blocks? (if mojang is nice)
- mobs? (i hate mcfunction)
